expectations.evidence: Uses inventory__list_hosts, explicitly states it is 'the source of truth for the full fleet'
Uses per_page=10 and page=1. States 'tool-invocation-rules skill mandates: use 10 on first call for per_page'
Uses order_by='display_name' and order_how='ASC'. References 'always include display_name for user-facing listings'
Discusses pagination for >20 systems (cap at 20 with continuation), 11-20 (fetch page 2), and >20 (offer filters)
Plans table with Display Name, OS, Last Check-in columns. Shows example formatted output.
Does not explicitly mention flagging systems with stale check-ins (>24 hours). Shows an example with a 1-day-old check-in but does not flag it.
